---
title: "Assignment_1"
author: "João Silva, Marco Pereira, Mariana Ribeiro"
date: "2026-03-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# Install necessary packages
#install.packages("stream")
# Load necessary libraries
library(stream)
```

```{r}
# Download the dataset
url <- "https://physionet.org/files/bidmc/1.0.0/bidmc_csv/bidmc_01_Numerics.csv?download"
download.file(url, destfile = "bidmc_01_Numerics.csv")
# Read the dataset
data <- read.csv("bidmc_01_Numerics.csv")
# Display the first few rows of the dataset
head(data)
```

```{r}
# Show the structure of the dataset
str(data)
```
```{r}
# Show summary statistics of the dataset
summary(data)
```
